title: malpighia macracantha subsp. macracantha
intro: Malpighia macracantha subsp. macracantha, also known as the Antigua araca or yellow mombin, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Malpighia macracantha subsp. macracantha include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and improve overall health. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a topical application to treat skin conditions.
